narrative.narrative: Gold's resilience and a weak USD (DXY) have fueled Bitcoin's sideways trend, echoing August 2024's market sentiment. Despite Fear & Greed at 23, investors remain skeptical, but this could signal an opportunity for strategic accumulation.
narrative.headline: Gold and USD Shifts Fuel BTC's Sideways Saga
